name: qradar-update-offense

outputs.description: The credibility of the offense QRadar.Offense.Relevance The relevance of the offense
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.Credibility

outputs.description: The severity of the offense QRadar.Offense.SourceAddress The source addresses that are associated with the offense.
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.Severity

outputs.description: The destination addresses that are associated with the offense. QRadar.Offense.AssignedTo The user the offense is assigned to.
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.DestinationAddress

outputs.description: date The time (ISO) when the offense was started. QRadar.Offense.ID
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.StartTime

outputs.description: The ID of the offense. QRadar.Offense.DestinationHostname Destination hostname
outputs.name: int

outputs.description: The description of the offense. QRadar.Offense.EventCount The number of events that are associated with the offense.
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.Description

outputs.description: The source of the offense. QRadar.Offense.Status The status of the offense. One of "OPEN", "HIDDEN", or "CLOSED".
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.OffenseSource

outputs.description: The magnitude of the offense. QRadar.Offense.ClosingUser The user that closed the offense
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.Magnitude

outputs.description: The offense closing reason. QRadar.Offense.CloseTime date
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.ClosingReason

outputs.description: QRadar.Offense.LastUpdatedTime date The time (ISO) when the offense was last updated.
outputs.name: The time when the offense was closed.

outputs.description: Event categories that are associated with the offense. QRadar.Offense.FlowCount The number of flows that are associated with the offense.
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.Categories

outputs.description: Offense followup. QRadar.Offense.OffenseType A number that represents the offense type
outputs.name: QRadar.Offense.FollowUp
